auth.welcomeBackSubtitle: Sign in to manage your bookings.
auth.taglineSubtitle: Reserve a slot across Schuler locations, get notified the moment the daily lottery resolves, and confirm in seconds.
auth.ssoNote: Single sign-on via Microsoft Azure AD
auth.registerSubtitle: Get started with SchulerPark in under a minute.
auth.azureFailed: Azure AD login failed. Please try again.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

dashboard.waitingConfirmation_one: You have {{count}} booking waiting for confirmation.
dashboard.waitingConfirmation_other: You have {{count}} bookings waiting for confirmation.
dashboard.noUpcomingHint: No upcoming bookings — pick a location below to get started.
dashboard.emptyDescription: Book a parking spot at any of the active locations below.
dashboard.quickBookSubtitle: Jump straight to date selection at one of your active locations.
dashboard.noLocationsDescription: Check back soon — admins are setting things up.

booking.weekInfo: Individual bookings will be created for each weekday. Blocked or already-booked days are skipped automatically.
booking.lotteryInfo: Daily lottery runs at 16:00 the day before. If you win, you have until 17:30 to confirm or the slot is reallocated.
booking.calendarLegend: Dots under each date show availability — <green>green</green> for plenty, <amber>amber</amber> for limited, <rose>red</rose> for almost full. Days the site is closed are crossed out.
booking.next1: You're entered into the lottery for the selected day(s).
booking.next2: Results are published at 16:00 the day before.
booking.next3: If you win, confirm by 17:30 from your bookings page.
booking.singleResultSubtitle: Your booking was placed at a fallback location.
booking.weekResultSubtitle: Here's what we were able to book for you.

myBookings.title: My bookings
myBookings.emptyDescription: Try a different filter, or book a new parking spot.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your account settings, preferences and personal data.
profile.personalInfoSubtitle: How you appear in bookings and notifications.
profile.preferredLocationHelper: New bookings default here. If unavailable, the system books a random alternative and notifies you.
profile.preferredSlotHelper: When you win the daily lottery, you get this exact slot if it's free; otherwise the nearest available slot. Select a preferred location first.
profile.pushSubtitle: Get notified the moment lottery results are ready.
profile.pushDenied: Push notifications are blocked. Please enable them in your browser settings.
profile.pushEnabled: Push notifications enabled on this device
profile.dsgvoSubtitle: Download all personal data we hold about you as a JSON file.
profile.dangerDescription: Your account will be deactivated immediately. All personal data will be permanently deleted after a 30-day grace period. This action cannot be undone.
profile.deleteDialogMessage: Are you sure you want to delete your account? Your account will be deactivated immediately and all data permanently deleted after 30 days. This cannot be undone.

privacy.title: Privacy Notice
privacy.subtitle: Privacy notice pursuant to DSGVO/GDPR
privacy.section1Body: Schuler Group, responsible for the SchulerPark parking booking system. For data protection inquiries, contact: datenschutz@schuler.de
privacy.section2_1: Account data: Email address, display name, car license plate (optional)
privacy.section2_2: Authentication data: Password hash (local accounts), Azure AD object ID (SSO accounts)
privacy.section2_3: Booking data: Parking slot bookings including date, time slot, location, and status
privacy.section2_4: Lottery data: Lottery participation history (win/loss records per location)
privacy.section2_5: Technical data: IP address for refresh token security (stored temporarily)
privacy.section3_1: Account & authentication: To provide access to the booking system (Art. 6(1)(b) DSGVO — contract performance)
privacy.section3_2: Booking data: To manage parking slot assignments and confirmations
privacy.section3_3: Lottery history: To ensure fair distribution of parking slots using weighted algorithms
privacy.section3_4: Technical data: To prevent unauthorized access and detect token theft (Art. 6(1)(f) — legitimate interest)
privacy.section4Body: Booking and lottery history data is automatically deleted after 1 year. Aggregate statistics (total bookings per lottery run) are retained without personal data. A weekly automated job enforces this retention policy.
privacy.section5_1: Right of access (Art. 15): Download all your personal data as JSON from your profile page
privacy.section5_2: Right to rectification (Art. 16): Update your display name and license plate in your profile
privacy.section5_3: Right to erasure (Art. 17): Request account deletion from your profile page. Your account is deactivated immediately and permanently deleted after 30 days
privacy.section5_4: Right to data portability (Art. 20): Export your data in machine-readable JSON format
privacy.section6Body: Your personal data is not shared with third parties. If you use Azure AD SSO, authentication is handled via Microsoft's identity platform. No booking data is transmitted externally.
privacy.section7Body:
For questions about data protection or to exercise your rights, contact:
Data Protection Officer
Email: datenschutz@schuler.de
